one_line_description: Ecommerce-focused helpdesk (deep Shopify integration) for support tickets across email, chat, and social.
auth_summary: Private apps authenticate with an API key plus the user's email via HTTP basic auth; OAuth2 is mandatory for public apps distributed through the Gorgias app store.
access_notes: API keys are obtained self-serve from a Gorgias account's settings (a paid plan or trial account is required); OAuth2 credentials require going through the app-store setup process.
api_surface_summary: REST API covering tickets, ticket messages, customers, tags, macros, teams, users, integrations, events, satisfaction surveys, and account settings.
agent_notes: Official first-party hosted MCP at mcp.gorgias.com/mcp, available on any paid Gorgias plan. Composio already lists a Gorgias toolkit (composio.dev/toolkits/gorgias appeared in search results). Public OAuth2 apps require the app-store setup process, a mild review-gate for a distributed OAuth integration.
